triples.subject: Gasoline prices
triples.object: a national average price of $5 a gallon
triples.sentence: Most Americans felt the pain of higher oil prices last summer when gasoline prices shot up, hitting a national average price of $5 a gallon.

triples.subject: Current policies and reasonable forecasts of EV adoption
triples.object: 50% of the vehicles on the road in 2040 will be EVs
triples.sentence: Current policies and reasonable forecasts of EV adoption suggest that 50% of the vehicles on the road in 2040 will be EVs.

triples.subject: Electric grid
triples.object: a mix of natural gas (39%), coal (20%), nuclear (18%), and renewables (23%)
triples.sentence: electric grid is powered by a mix of natural gas (39%), coal (20%), nuclear (18%), and renewables (23%)
